faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Douglaston typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. Ground nests or easy-to-reach areas are usually on the lower end, while high-elevation nests in attics, chimneys, or second-story eaves may cost more. We provide upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Douglaston?

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Douglaston commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often build ground nests in yards, while paper wasps create umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and porches. Bald-faced hornets build large, gray paper nests in trees and shrubs, particularly common near Alley Pond Park and wooded areas of the neighborhood.
